_comment: PLACEHOLDER: UI strings here are English for now (the album is English-only). Translate when localizing; see album.englishOnly for the user-facing notice.

album.title: The Wanderer's Return
album.subtitle: Seven songs through the densities
album.description: A journey through the seven densities of consciousness — and the cycle that begins again.
album.englishOnly: Cet album n'est disponible qu'en anglais pour le moment.

firstBreath.title: First Breath
firstBreath.description: Elemental awareness — the first spark of knowing.

theReaching.title: The Reaching
theReaching.description: Life straining toward a light it cannot name.

behindTheVeil.title: Behind the Veil
behindTheVeil.description: The veil, the choice, and a voice from the other side.

known.title: Known
known.description: The veil lifts — every heart becomes transparent.

coldLight.title: Cold Light
coldLight.description: Wisdom that can see everything, and warm nothing.

aMillionYearsAhead.title: A Million Years Ahead
aMillionYearsAhead.description: The higher self remembers — and answers.

gateway.title: Gateway
gateway.description: The return to the One, and the choice to begin again.
